name: Median income single earner
description: Employee earning €35,000 annually. INPS contributions (9.19%) are deducted from gross BEFORE calculating IRPEF. Benefits from 2026 rate reduction (33% vs 35% on second bracket), employment tax credit, and €625 cuneo fiscale deduction. Verified using verify_italy_tax.py script implementing official formulas.

sources.description: INPS employee contributions are deducted from gross before IRPEF calculation
2026 reduced rate (33% vs 35%) on second bracket
Verified using verify_italy_tax.py (independent Python implementation of official formulas)
